allow: PowerShell($b=[System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\('Assets/Scripts/GameCore/Services/CardEffectService.cs'\); $i=[Array]::IndexOf\($b,[byte]0xE9\); $bom = \($b[0] -eq 0xEF -and $b[1] -eq 0xBB -and $b[2] -eq 0xBF\); Write-Output \("0xE9 index: $i"\); Write-Output \("UTF8 BOM: $bom"\); $c3=[Array]::IndexOf\($b,[byte]0xC3\); Write-Output \("0xC3 index: $c3"\))

PowerShell($f='Assets\\Scripts\\UI\\LocalGameUI.cs'; $b=[System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($f\); $bom = \($b[0] -eq 0xEF -and $b[1] -eq 0xBB -and $b[2] -eq 0xBF\); Write-Output \("BOM: $bom"\); $idx=[Array]::IndexOf\($b,[byte]0xC3\); Write-Output \("first 0xC3 at: $idx"\); if\($idx -ge 0\){ Write-Output \("bytes around: " + \($b[$idx..\([Math]::Min\($idx+3,$b.Length-1\)\)] | ForEach-Object { $_.ToString\('X2'\) }\) \) }; Write-Output '--- git diff numstat ---')
